bullets: US President Trump raises global tariffs to 15% in defiance of a Supreme Court ruling limiting his powers, causing widespread economic uncertainty.
Mexican security forces kill Jalisco cartel leader 'El Mencho', sparking retaliatory violence and chaos in at least a dozen states.
A massive blizzard hits the US Northeast, dumping over 2 feet of snow and affecting 41 million people with severe travel disruptions.
Russia intensifies attacks on Ukraine's power grid with drones and missiles, killing at least one in Kyiv ahead of the war's fourth anniversary.
Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon's Bekaa Valley kill 10 people, heightening tensions with Hezbollah amid ongoing regional conflicts.
cybercab: Tesla begins production of the Cybercab autonomous vehicle at Giga Texas, with Elon Musk confirming a $30,000 price by 2027.
market_mood: Global stock markets tumbled amid fears of trade disruptions from President Trump's new tariff policies, with the Dow Jones falling over 800 points.
hot_spot: The Russia-Ukraine war persists as the most urgent geopolitical crisis, marked by recent Russian strikes on Ukrainian infrastructure as the conflict enters its fifth year.
